export.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.

import.desc: Verify US content thresholds and license conditions on components returning to China.
Collect manufacturer ECCN classifications and any BIS license references in the commercial invoice packet.

export.desc: Ensure radio equipment meets EU RED essential requirements with Declaration of Conformity and technical file.
Document restricted substances (RoHS) and SVHC disclosures (REACH) for cables, PCBs, and housings.
Confirm WEEE registration in destination member state if placing EEE on the EU market.
Align 10-digit TARIC/CN code with product function; retain GIR classification memo for customs audit.

import.desc: Screen EU-origin controlled technology and re-export conditions before China inbound clearance.

export.task: Rules of origin certificate (Form E / RCEP)
export.desc: Prepare origin documentation for Vietnam/Malaysia routes to defend against transshipment challenges.
Document value-added steps in ASEAN to support legitimate origin claims for IC assemblies.

import.desc: Collect mill/factory certificates and BOM origin breakdown for re-exported modules.

export.desc: Block Russia-bound advanced computing, telecom, and fab equipment against embargo and SDN lists.
Obtain signed end-user statements and commodity classification worksheets for high-risk electronics.

import.desc: Verify Russia-sourced items against restricted party and import ban schedules before China entry.
Screen Taiwan-origin lithography, wafer, and advanced IC items for PRC import licensing and technology controls.
Retain contracts and technical parameters supporting lawful cross-strait technology flows.

export.desc: Assess Taiwan-related electronics for technology transfer restrictions on outbound shipments from China.

import.desc: For Japan-origin electrical apparatus, confirm PSE marking and test reports where applicable to inbound use.
Collect Japan radio law certificates for wireless modules embedded in the product.
Prepare end-user statements for HS 8486/8542 precision equipment imported from Japan.

export.desc: Verify whether high-tech goods require Japan METI export notification before shipment.

import.desc: Confirm Korea-origin electrical and radio products meet KC safety requirements referenced in supplier certificates.
Screen DRAM/HBM/NAND Korea-origin ICs for technology control and end-use restrictions on China import.
Collect Korea export classification and license references for controlled semiconductors.

export.desc: Verify Korea export licensing for advanced logic and memory when re-exporting from China.
Prepare commercial invoice, packing list, contract, and export license slots for general electronics.
Run China export control and cryptography reviews for wireless/secure computing features.

import.desc: Prepare customs declaration, origin proof, and inspection/quarantine slots as applicable.
Identify whether China market access certifications apply to the finished product category.
